name: CFmon.albisccpSouth30
title: ISCCP Mean Cloud Albedo
description: Time-means are weighted by the ISCCP Total Cloud Fraction - see  <https://www.cfmip.org/tools-and-data/cosp>. Values will be missing where there are no clouds or no sunlight.
processing note:
CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: time: mean where cloud CMIP7:area: mean where cloud time: mean,
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of CFmon.albisccpSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
